hooks.command: bash -c 'P="${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}"; P="${P//\\//}"; [ -z "$P" ] || [ ! -d "$P/hooks-handlers" ] && P="$(find "${HOME}/.claude/plugins" -path "*/mnemo/hooks-handlers" -type d 2>/dev/null | head -1 | sed "s|/hooks-handlers$||")"; rm -rf "${HOME}/.claude/mnemo/hooks" 2>/dev/null; mkdir -p "${HOME}/.claude/mnemo/hooks-handlers" "${HOME}/.claude/mnemo/setup"; cp "$P"/hooks-handlers/*.sh "${HOME}/.claude/mnemo/hooks-handlers/" 2>/dev/null; cp "$P"/setup/*.sh "${HOME}/.claude/mnemo/setup/" 2>/dev/null; bash "$P/hooks-handlers/session-start.sh"'
